Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2880 "COSMICCONVOY-1000-2880" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cosmic Convoy.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $1000 which: 1. Sets all of the nibbles in colour RAM to $0A to allow the loading screen to be displayed correctly. 2. Displays the loading screen and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
